system.flavor: You intensify gravity's effect in an area, pulling foes to their knees.
system.effect:
Zone create a crackling zone of strong gravitational collapse in free space in range, with the following effects:
• The space is difficult terrain
• Foes that willingly enter the zone for the first time in a turn or start their turn there gain slow.
• Afflicted foes cannot voluntarily dash, fly, swap, or teleport when entering or exiting any space of the zone.
